steps.title: Recognize that the expressions are reciprocals
steps.content: $\frac{x}{9}$ and $\frac{9}{x}$ are reciprocals — their product equals 1.

steps.title: Solve for the target expression
steps.content:
Since $\frac{x}{9} \cdot \frac{9}{x} = 1$ and we know $\frac{x}{9} = 5$:
$$5 \cdot \frac{9}{x} = 1$$
$$\frac{9}{x} = \frac{1}{5}$$
That matches choice B — B is correct.
